title: Coding Prompts, Scoped Edits, and Regression Control · Prompt Lens: Change Scope
summary: Implement a repository change with tests and minimal unrelated churn. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt change scope increment in a coding-agent implementation brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Name desired behavior, relevant area, preserved contracts, and authorized refactor scope.
Handle timeouts, partial results, retries, and alternate evidence without looping blindly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.
